containers.name: cleanup
command:
echo "Starting cleanup job at $(date)"

response=$(curl -s -w "\n%{http_code}" \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer ${CRON_SECRET}" \
  "${API_URL}")

http_code=$(echo "$response" | tail -n1)
body=$(echo "$response" | head -n-1)

echo "Response code: $http_code"
echo "Response body: $body"

if [ "$http_code" -eq 200 ]; then
  echo "Cleanup completed successfully"
  exit 0
else
  echo "Cleanup failed with code $http_code"
  exit 1
fi

containers.name: k6
command: mkdir -p $(dirname /tmp/load-test-create-only.js.archived.tar) && k6 archive /test/load-test-create-only.js -O /tmp/load-test-create-only.js.archived.tar  2> /tmp/k6logs && k6 inspect --execution-requirements /tmp/load-test-create-only.js.archived.tar 2> /tmp/k6logs ; ! cat /tmp/k6logs | grep 'level=error'
